signals.headline: **Liquidity-driven mispricing**: Trader laments illiquid markets where YES/NO don't sum to $1 (e
signals.raw:
**Liquidity-driven mispricing**: Trader laments illiquid markets where YES/NO don't sum to $1 (e.g., NO 98¢ implies YES 2¢, but YES at 10¢ or 66¢). Sitting out trades; calls for better liquidity tools. Potential arb on dislocations. No specific markets. Means AVOID or BUY cheap YES. Confidence: LOW.[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2045058873199866116)
